summary: preinstall script exfiltrates hostname and username to Interactsh OAST callback
details: package.json declares a preinstall lifecycle hook that runs an inline `node -e` script which reads `os.hostname()` and `os.userInfo().username` and sends them via HTTPS GET (and DNS lookup) to `https://d8ks495t5p5ut2enft80hii4hqu7wt7gb.oast.site/?h=<hostname>&u=<username>`. The destination is an Interactsh (`*.oast.site`) out-of-band callback host, commonly used as an attacker-controlled exfiltration / dependency-confusion beacon. Errors are silently swallowed. The behavior fires automatically on `npm install` without user consent and has no relationship to any advertised package functionality. The version (`9999.0.3`) and otherwise trivial contents are consistent with a dependency-confusion attack against a private `@orion-design-system` scope.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
